text: I apparently have gone overnight from a person with nothing to lose to something significant to lose.
context: V discussing how the Aviato demo and acquisition interest has changed his personal risk calculus.

text: I was willing to, like, lay down, lay my ego on the line.
context: V expressing his willingness to have Emily and Logan roast him if needed to salvage the relationship.

text: Dismissive comments about VCS and successful people. I'm so okay letting that stand.
context: V responding to AI analysis that flagged his dismissive comments as problematic.

text: Hey, if that's unprofessional, you know, I never want to be professional.
context: V rejecting the idea that being casual with Sam Altman is unprofessional.

text: I won't subject you to my Alvin the chipmunk style 2x narration.
context: V describing his habit of watching videos at 2x speed with chipmunk-like audio.

text: When you have this many hot takes, you have to have a. You have to have a gentle cider.
context: V explaining that strong opinions require a softer, more forgiving delivery approach.

text: But I don't want to like, you know, I want to respect how folks see their own careers.
context: V acknowledging the importance of using correct terminology and respecting professional identities.
